description: Expected outcomes for power user personas (P12-P14). AI agents evaluate estimator stability, domain switching, and rapid input handling.

expectations.mapExpectation: Well-developed green in physics region after 125 questions. Smooth gradient transitions. No blank spots or visual artifacts from high observation count.

powerUserSpecific.smoothProgression: domain-mapped % should increase steadily, never drop
powerUserSpecific.criticalRange: 115-125 questions — watch for matrix conditioning issues

expectations.mapExpectation: Multiple green regions across switched domains. No state leakage between domains — switching should produce clean map transitions.

powerUserSpecific.mapUpdatesAfterSwitch: Map should reflect new domain immediately, no stale renders

expectations.mapExpectation: Moderate coverage of biology despite rapid input. Map should handle fast updates without visual glitches or lag accumulation.
